title: Pregnancy test livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Pregnancy test livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pregnancy testing

pcs.text: Prepare physical resources, human resources and relevant documentation for pregnancy testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare physical resources, human resources and relevant documentation for pregnancy testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare physical resources, human resources and relevant documentation for pregnancy testing.

pcs.text: Muster, yard and safely restrain livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures, and workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Muster, yard and safely restrain livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures, and workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Muster, yard and safely restrain livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures, and workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Draft livestock to be tested according to breeding or management program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Draft livestock to be tested according to breeding or management program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draft livestock to be tested according to breeding or management program requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report pregnancy testing operations and outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Carry out pregnancy testing procedures

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to address risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to address risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to address risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task.

pcs.text: restrain individual animals for testing and check individual breeding records

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can restrain individual animals for testing and check individual breeding records.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean rectal area of animal prior to examination where applicable.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out ultrasound or rectal examination and palpation to establish pregnancy or non-pregnancy.

pcs.text: Determine the number of foetuses where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the number of foetuses where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the number of foetuses where possible.

pcs.text: Implement strict workplace hygiene procedures between pregnancy testing individual animals according to workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement strict workplace hygiene procedures between pregnancy testing individual animals according to workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record identities and relevant details of livestock tested.
